global_description: A medium-sized seabird with a robust, streamlined body. Predominantly white with a gray back and wings. It features a yellow, hooked beak and pink legs. The wings are long and pointed, and the tail is short and square.

part_details.head: White, smooth, rounded with a yellow eye ring.
part_details.beak: Yellow, thick, slightly hooked at the tip.
part_details.wings: Long, pointed, gray with black wingtips.
part_details.tail: Short, square, white with gray markings.

spatial_relations: The gray wings extend from the sides of the white body.
The yellow beak protrudes from the front of the white head.
The pink legs are positioned under the body, supporting it.
